title: ononis variegata f. erioclada
intro: Ononis variegata f. erioclada is a plant species within the genus Ononis, commonly known as the stickleback or sticklewort, and is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. Traditionally, Ononis variegata f. erioclada has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues such as diarrhea, dysentery, and liver problems. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders, fever, and skin conditions. Ononis variegata f. erioclada can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health issues.
